title: TEST: Gemma sceglie bene
description: backgroundImage assente, il testo punta chiaramente a una location del catalogo (una locanda affollata): Gemma dovrebbe scegliere loc_tavern.

scenes.narrativeText: You push through the tavern door into noise and firelight. Patrons crowd the long tables, mugs thumping wood in time with a fiddler's tune, while the innkeeper shouts orders toward the kitchen. You find a gap at the bar and wait to be noticed.

choices.choiceText: Order a drink and listen for rumors

scenes.narrativeText: The rumors lead nowhere tonight. You finish your drink and call it an evening.
